summary: The user is working on a detailed model kit and is seeking advice on correcting a mistake made with the hull, specifically a gap caused by excess glue. They are also interested in building a futuristic spaceship model and are looking for recommendations on sci-fi model kits and manufacturers, while noting the challenges of purchasing online without immediate access to store staff for assistance.
facts: The user is currently working on a detailed model kit that they purchased online from an online retailer. The user applied too much glue while assembling the hull, causing parts to shift and creating a gap between two sections. The user is considering building a model of a futuristic spaceship next. The user found a concept art website with amazing designs for their next project. The user is researching different designs online for their futuristic spaceship model. The user is experiencing difficulty finding the right sci-fi model kit for their next project due to the challenges of online shopping.
